narrative.headline: 2019 VW Jetta: powertrain, electrical, and engine drive the complaints
narrative.summary: Power train and electrical system issues dominate owner complaints for this Jetta generation, with many reports describing grinding noises during low-speed driving and unexpected engine shutoffs. Electrical failures stand out because they appear to cascade — owners report losing power steering and brake effectiveness in the same event as the shutoff. Engine complaints also appear at a similar rate, with some reports mentioning transmission grinding alongside unrelated trim and latch concerns.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report a loud grinding sound from the torque converter area of automatic-transmission vehicles when driving at low engine speeds, with some noting the issue forces a more aggressive driving style to avoid it. · 3 crash · 5 injured

issues.sample: THE CAR SHUT OFF, I LOST CONTROL OF THE POWER STEERING AND THE BREAKS FAILED TO STOP AFTER THE COMPUTER SHUT THE CAR OFF.  NOW THEY CALM THE SHIFTER IS DEFECTIVE AND NEEDS REPLACED AFTER THERE COMPUTER DIAGNOSTIC CODES FAILED TO DETECT THE PROBLEM THE FIRST 2 TIMES AND A TEST DRI
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners describe the car shutting off without warning, resulting in simultaneous loss of power steering and reduced braking effectiveness, with diagnostic codes pointing to a defective shifter component. · 2 crash · 6 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report a grinding noise from the transmission during slower-speed operation, sometimes mentioned alongside a trunk latch that fails to secure unless the lid is fully overextended. · 2 fire · 4 crash · 4 injured

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report brakes failing to stop the vehicle after an unexpected computer-triggered shutoff also eliminates power steering. · 4 crash · 5 injured

issues.title: Exterior Lighting
issues.blurb: The smallest area: 26 complaints (5%), 1 injury, with no crashes or fires reported. Mostly a check-the-lights-work item.
